detectors.description:
FlokiInu.sendETHToFee(uint256) (FlokiInu.sol#759-765) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10)) (FlokiInu.sol#761)
	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10)) (FlokiInu.sol#763)
detectors.markdown:
[FlokiInu.sendETHToFee(uint256)](FlokiInu.sol#L759-L765) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [_teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10))](FlokiInu.sol#L761)
	- [_marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10))](FlokiInu.sol#L763)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in FlokiInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (FlokiInu.sol#625-727):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (FlokiInu.sol#699)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (FlokiInu.sol#741-753)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (FlokiInu.sol#705)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10)) (FlokiInu.sol#761)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10)) (FlokiInu.sol#763)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (FlokiInu.sol#725)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (FlokiInu.sol#933)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (FlokiInu.sol#913)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (FlokiInu.sol#915)
	FlokiInu._rOwned (FlokiInu.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FlokiInu._takeTeam(uint256) (FlokiInu.sol#927-935)
	- FlokiInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (FlokiInu.sol#887-923)
	- FlokiInu.balanceOf(address) (FlokiInu.sol#451-455)
	- FlokiInu.constructor(address,address) (FlokiInu.sol#397-415)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (FlokiInu.sol#725)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (FlokiInu.sol#941)
	FlokiInu._rTotal (FlokiInu.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FlokiInu._getCurrentSupply() (FlokiInu.sol#1083-1093)
	- FlokiInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (FlokiInu.sol#939-945)
	- FlokiInu.constructor(address,address) (FlokiInu.sol#397-415)
	- FlokiInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (FlokiInu.sol#555-577)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in FlokiInu.openTrading() (FlokiInu.sol#769-817):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (FlokiInu.sol#781-783)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (FlokiInu.sol#785-799)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (FlokiInu.sol#785-799)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (FlokiInu.sol#807)
	FlokiInu.tradingOpen (FlokiInu.sol#371) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FlokiInu.openTrading() (FlokiInu.sol#769-817)
